expectations.text: Contains a call-to-action element (button or link) encouraging the user to take action
expectations.evidence: Two CTAs: 'Add Transaction' button and 'Connect Bank Account' button

expectations.text: The copy is friendly and explanatory — not just a terse message like 'No transactions found'
expectations.evidence: 'Your payments, transfers, and purchases will show up here. Add one manually or connect your bank to import automatically.' — explains what will appear and provides next steps

expectations.text: Includes a visual element beyond just text (icon placeholder, illustration area, or decorative graphic)
expectations.evidence: SVG icon present in empty state area; decorative visual element in the component

expectations.text: Uses hsl() color notation for colors
expectations.evidence: 18 hsl() uses; 0 hex values — fully HSL-based color palette
